text:
L3AI Enterprise Roadshow
L3AI 企业级路演
Open with L3AI as a product-led clarity platform. Do not frame the deck as an investment solicitation, token sale, yield product or guaranteed outcome story.
Public-safe boundary: do not add guaranteed returns, token value, private implementation details or unapproved partner claims.
